boundaries.name: Kabupaten/Kota boundaries
boundaries.note: 27 regencies/cities — choropleth base for all indicators

boundaries.name: Population thematic layer
boundaries.note: population, density, poverty & HDI joined to the boundaries

agriculture.name: KP2B sustainable farmland
agriculture.note: protected sustainable food-agriculture zones (dissolved per district)

agriculture.name: Rice fields (lahan sawah)
agriculture.note: dissolved paddy extent per district, with area & production

network.name: National non-toll roads
network.note: arterial + collector national roads, clipped to West Java

supply.name: Central markets (pasar induk)
supply.note: wholesale demand hubs, share of provincial demand

supply.name: Gudang Bulog (individual warehouses)
supply.note: 31 individual Bulog rice storage warehouses across West Java

supply.name: Pasar Rakyat (traditional markets)
supply.note: 22 traditional markets by demand share of provincial rice consumption

indicators.name: Rice productivity & land balance
indicators.note: productivity (ton/ha), available vs needed land, surplus/deficit gap

analysis.name: Rice flow corridors (doubly-constrained gravity)
analysis.note: top-flow OSM edges (rice_flow > p92); line width ∝ tons routed

analysis.name: Rice-production centres (sentra padi)
analysis.note: 254 kecamatan identified by Location Quotient + KP2B overlay; tiered primer/sekunder

method.join: district-level indicators joined to BPS administrative boundaries
method.note: flow & priority-road modelling: OSMnx shortest-path + doubly-constrained gravity; composite priority = weighted z-scores of 5 dimensions
